name: MAXLINEAR, INC
business: MaxLinear is a provider of communications systems-on-chip (SoCs) used in broadband, mobile and wireline infrastructure, data center, and industrial and multi-market applications. Its products integrate RF, high-performance analog, mixed-signal, digital signal processing, security engines, data compression, networking layers, and power management. Customers include electronics distributors, module makers, OEMs, and ODMs that incorporate the products into a wide range of electronic devices.

exposures.sentence: We are a provider of communications systems-on-chip, or SoCs, used in broadband, mobile and wireline infrastructure, data center, and industrial and multi-market applications.

Examples of such devices include radio transceivers and modems for 4G/5G base-station and backhaul infrastructure; optical transceivers targeting hyperscale data centers; Wi-Fi and wireline routers for home networking; broadband modems compliant with Data Over Cable Service Interface Specifications, or DOCSIS, passive optical fiber standards, or PON, and digital subscriber line, or DSL; as well as power management and interface products used in these and many other markets.

Examples of such devices include radio transceivers and modems for 4G/5G base-station and backhaul infrastructure; optical transceivers targeting hyperscale data centers; Wi-Fi and wireline routers for home networking; broadband modems compliant with Data Over Cable Service Interface Specifications, or DOCSIS, passive optical fiber standards, or PON, and digital subscriber line, or DSL; as well as power management and interface products used in these and many other markets.

Our product portfolio, featuring serial interfaces, Universal Serial Bus, or USB, Universal Asynchronous Receiver-Transmitters, or UARTS, Peripheral Component Interconnect Express, or PCIe, devices, data converters, and Power Management Integrated Circuits, or PMICs, is strategically positioned to capitalize on such growth opportunities in this expanding market.

The explosive emergence of artificial intelligence, or AI, platforms and services such as OpenAI, Copilot, Anthropic Claude, and Google Gemini, which broadly amplify human ability to harness high-performance computing within the data center
